test_migrations.py asserts migration maps legacy state flags: preview/detect→SUCCEEDED, align→NOT_STARTED, notes→SUCCEEDED.

test_preview_service.py asserts PreviewService.execute succeeds with result.revision not None and reloaded project retains slide_count == 2 with uid 's1'.
test_preview_service.py asserts CancellationToken.trigger before execute raises StageFailureError('cancel') and leaves slide_count == 2 unchanged.
test_preview_service.py asserts adapter RuntimeError('decoder failed') raises StageFailureError and observer receives ProgressUpdate percent 10 and 100.
test_detection_service.py asserts detect replaces slides (old1 gone, d1/d2 present) and marks pipeline.status('align') as StageStatus.STALE.
test_detection_service.py asserts cancellation before mutation preserves old slide_count == 1 and uid 'old1' is still present.
test_detection_service.py asserts CapturingDetector receives project config: sample_fps=0.5, threshold='auto', min_slide_duration=10.0.
test_alignment_service.py asserts dry_run returns success with revision=None and leaves slides[0].interval.end at 5.0 (no save).
test_alignment_service.py asserts apply updates slides[0].interval.end to 5.5, sets pipeline.status('align') to SUCCEEDED, and data['boundaries_moved'] == 1.
test_alignment_service.py asserts missing subtitles returns success=False with 'Subtitles' in result.error.
test_notes_service.py asserts basic mode sets get_slide('s1').notes == 'cleaned notes' and pipeline.status('notes') to SUCCEEDED.
test_notes_service.py asserts LLM failure raises StageFailureError('LLM gateway') and leaves get_slide('s1').notes == ''.
test_notes_service.py asserts result.data['raw_cues_preserved'] is True and transcript remains 'raw' after processing.
test_export_service.py asserts markdown export succeeds with slide_count == 2, image_count == 1, and exporter.title == 'export-test' (project name).
test_export_service.py asserts overwrite=False with existing file returns success=False with 'overwrite=False' in error.
test_export_service.py asserts dry_run leaves pipeline.status('markdown_export') as NOT_STARTED.
test_validation_service.py asserts a valid canonical project returns result.data['valid'] is True.
test_validation_service.py asserts removing slides.json produces errors containing 'slides.json' and result.data['valid'] is False.
test_validation_service.py asserts disabling all checks (check_storage=False, etc.) returns valid is True.
test_auto_service.py asserts mode='full' runs stages in order: ['preview','detect','align','notes','export','validate'] with each success True.
test_auto_service.py asserts mode='resume' marks already-SUCCEEDED detect as skipped while preview success remains True.
test_auto_service.py asserts detect failure halts pipeline: align/notes/export/validate marked skipped and data['failed_stage'] == 'detect'.
test_common.py asserts ServiceResult.ok/fail factories produce frozen DTOs with success/stage/data/revision fields.
test_common.py asserts ServiceContext with triggered CancellationToken propagates CancellationError on check_cancelled('align').
test_common.py asserts ServiceContext.report_progress calls observer.on_progress with ProgressUpdate(25, 'quarter').
